notes: Solid Galaga clone with working formation, diving, tractor beam capture, dual-ship mechanic, and bonus stages, but enemy sprites are minimal wireframe outlines rather than recognizable Galaga art, and the formation layout uses only 4-wide rows instead of the classic wider grid, reducing visual authenticity.

Impressive inclusion of advanced mechanics like the tractor beam and dual fighter, but uses wireframe graphics instead of sprites and has a janky rescue implementation where the ship auto-docks regardless of X position.

A solid playable Galaga-like with working movement, shooting, formations, dives, capture/rescue, and stage flow, but visuals are only approximate and several mechanics/behaviors are simplified or not fully authentic to real Galaga.
